customer_msg: How do I change my domain name?
ai_response:
You cannot directly change a domain name on an existing hosting account. You would need to purchase a new domain and set up a new hosting package for it.

If you already have a new domain, I can help you point it to your current hosting. Could you please provide your domain name so I can check your account and verify this?
